name: hf-credit-negotiator
description: MCP specification for the hedge fund credit negotiation agent. Evaluates bank term proposals and submits counter-proposals.

tools.name: evaluate_terms
tools.description: Evaluate bank-proposed credit terms. Returns either a counter-proposal hash or signals acceptance (counter with same hash).

proposal_hash.description: keccak256 of counter-proposal (may equal terms_hash if accepting)

accepting.description: True if the HF is accepting the terms as-is

prompts.name: term_evaluation
prompts.description: Hedge fund credit term evaluation prompt for negotiation.
